title: Add info-file and cover features to write_btor
code_blocks:
yosys -p 'read_verilog -sv test.v; prep; dump; write_btor -i x'; cat x
yosys -p 'read_verilog -sv test.v; prep; dump; write_btor -c -i x'; cat x
yosys -p 'read_verilog -sv test.v; synth; dump; write_btor -i x'; cat x
yosys -p 'read_verilog -sv test.v; synth; dump; write_btor -c -i x'; cat x
